---
title: "Presentations"
toc: false
number-sections: false
---

<style>
.tabs { display:flex; justify-content:center; gap:0.5rem; margin:1.5rem 0; flex-wrap:wrap; }
.tab-btn { padding:0.5rem 1.2rem; border:2px solid #1a365d; border-radius:20px; background:white; color:#1a365d; cursor:pointer; font-size:0.85rem; font-weight:500; transition:all 0.2s; }
.tab-btn:hover,.tab-btn.active { background:#1a365d; color:white; }
.deck { display:none; }
.deck.active { display:block; }
.viewer-wrap { background:white; border-radius:8px; box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); overflow:hidden; }
.viewer-header { padding:1rem 1.5rem; border-bottom:1px solid #eee; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.5rem; }
.viewer-header h3 { font-size:1.15rem; color:#1a365d; margin:0; }
.viewer-header .meta { font-size:0.8rem; color:#888; }
.dl-btn { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:0.4rem; padding:0.5rem 1rem; border-radius:6px; font-size:0.85rem; text-decoration:none; font-weight:500; background:#1a365d; color:white; transition:all 0.2s; }
.dl-btn:hover { background:#2d5a8e; color:white; }
.pdf-viewer { width:100%; height:75vh; min-height:500px; border:none; }
.intro { text-align:center; color:#555; margin-bottom:0.5rem; }
.intro a { color:#2d5a8e; }
@media(max-width:560px){ .pdf-viewer{height:50vh;min-height:350px;} }
@media(max-width:768px){
  .pdf-viewer {
    /* Mobile browsers can't scroll iframes well; use object tag fallback */
    -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
    overflow: auto;
  }
  .viewer-wrap { position: relative; }
  .mobile-pdf-hint {
    display: block;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 8px;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: #888;
    background: #f9f9f9;
    border-top: 1px solid #eee;
  }
  .mobile-pdf-hint a { color: #2d5a8e; }
}
@media(min-width:769px){ .mobile-pdf-hint { display:none !important; } }
</style>

::: {.column-page}

<p class="intro">
AI-generated slide decks offering unique perspectives on the TCBL review.<br>
Generated by <a href="https://notebooklm.google.com" target="_blank">Google NotebookLM</a> and <a href="https://www.kimi.com/slides" target="_blank">Kimi AI</a>.
</p>

<div class="tabs">
<div style="font-size:0.75rem;color:#888;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.05em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">NotebookLM</div>
<button class="tab-btn active" onclick="showDeck(0)">🌀 Blueprint (New)</button>
<button class="tab-btn" onclick="showDeck(1)">🇨🇳 中文版</button>
<button class="tab-btn" onclick="showDeck(2)">🏗️ PBWE</button>
<button class="tab-btn" onclick="showDeck(3)">⚙️ Engineering</button>
<button class="tab-btn" onclick="showDeck(4)">🌐 Blueprint (v1)</button>
<div style="font-size:0.75rem;color:#888;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.05em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;margin-top:0.5rem;">Kimi AI</div>
<button class="tab-btn" onclick="showDeck(5)">🤖 English</button>
<button class="tab-btn" onclick="showDeck(6)">🤖 中文</button>
</div>

<div class="deck active" id="deck-0">
<div class="viewer-wrap">
<div class="viewer-header">
<div><h3>🌀 The Atmospheric Blueprint (Latest)</h3><div class="meta">March 13, 2026 · Comprehensive overview</div></div>
<a class="dl-btn" href="presentations/NLM_New_Slides.pdf" download>📥 PDF</a>
</div>
<iframe class="pdf-viewer" src="presentations/NLM_New_Slides.pdf" loading="lazy"></iframe>
</div>
</div>

<div class="deck" id="deck-1">
<div class="viewer-wrap">
<div class="viewer-header">
<div><h3>🇨🇳 TCBL Modeling Guide（中文版）</h3><div class="meta">2026年3月13日 · 台风边界层建模综述中文演示</div></div>
<a class="dl-btn" href="presentations/NLM_TCBL_Chinese.pdf" download>📥 PDF</a>
</div>
<iframe class="pdf-viewer" src="presentations/NLM_TCBL_Chinese.pdf" loading="lazy"></iframe>
</div>
</div>

<div class="deck" id="deck-2">
<div class="viewer-wrap">
<div class="viewer-header">
<div><h3>🏗️ TCBL Modeling for PBWE</h3><div class="meta">March 11, 2026 · Performance-based wind engineering focus</div></div>
<a class="dl-btn" href="presentations/NLM_TCBL_Modeling_PBWE.pdf" download>📥 PDF</a>
</div>
<iframe class="pdf-viewer" src="presentations/NLM_TCBL_Modeling_PBWE.pdf" loading="lazy"></iframe>
</div>
</div>

<div class="deck" id="deck-3">
<div class="viewer-wrap">
<div class="viewer-header">
<div><h3>⚙️ TCBL Engineering Models</h3><div class="meta">March 11, 2026 · Model classification & comparison</div></div>
<a class="dl-btn" href="presentations/NLM_TCBL_Engineering_Models.pdf" download>📥 PDF</a>
</div>
<iframe class="pdf-viewer" src="presentations/NLM_TCBL_Engineering_Models.pdf" loading="lazy"></iframe>
</div>
</div>

<div class="deck" id="deck-4">
<div class="viewer-wrap">
<div class="viewer-header">
<div><h3>🌐 The Atmospheric Blueprint (v1)</h3><div class="meta">March 11, 2026 · Earlier version with different emphasis</div></div>
<a class="dl-btn" href="presentations/NLM_Atmospheric_Blueprint.pdf" download>📥 PDF</a>
</div>
<iframe class="pdf-viewer" src="presentations/NLM_Atmospheric_Blueprint.pdf" loading="lazy"></iframe>
</div>
</div>

<div class="deck" id="deck-5">
<div class="viewer-wrap">
<div class="viewer-header">
<div><h3>🤖 Kimi — TCBL Overview (English)</h3><div class="meta">March 13, 2026 · Generated by Kimi AI</div></div>
<a class="dl-btn" href="presentations/Kimi_TCBL_English.pdf" download>📥 PDF</a>
</div>
<iframe class="pdf-viewer" src="presentations/Kimi_TCBL_English.pdf" loading="lazy"></iframe>
</div>
</div>

<div class="deck" id="deck-6">
<div class="viewer-wrap">
<div class="viewer-header">
<div><h3>🤖 Kimi — 台风边界层模型研究进展（中文）</h3><div class="meta">2026年3月13日 · Kimi AI 生成</div></div>
<a class="dl-btn" href="presentations/Kimi_TCBL_Chinese.pdf" download>📥 PDF</a>
</div>
<iframe class="pdf-viewer" src="presentations/Kimi_TCBL_Chinese.pdf" loading="lazy"></iframe>
</div>
</div>

:::

<script>
function showDeck(idx) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.deck').forEach((d,i) => d.classList.toggle('active', i===idx));
  document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach((b,i) => b.classList.toggle('active', i===idx));
}

// Mobile: add "open in new tab" hint below each PDF viewer
if (window.innerWidth <= 768) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.pdf-viewer').forEach(iframe => {
    const src = iframe.getAttribute('src');
    const hint = document.createElement('div');
    hint.className = 'mobile-pdf-hint';
    hint.innerHTML = '📱 滑动不便？<a href="' + src + '" target="_blank">点击全屏查看 PDF</a>';
    iframe.parentElement.appendChild(hint);
  });
}
</script>
